mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rooms (room_number, type, price, status) VALUES (#{roomNumber}, #{type}, #{price}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rooms WHERE status = 0) AS available, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT room_number) FROM bookings WHERE status = 1) AS booked, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT room_number) FROM bookings WHERE status = 2) AS occupied
